# ——————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————
# vsearch helpers
# ——————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————

#' Find the vsearch executable
#'
#' @description
#' Locates the `vsearch` executable on the system PATH, or verifies a
#' user-supplied path. This is a lightweight standalone version of the
#' helper found in MiscMetabar, so that dbpq does not need to depend on
#' MiscMetabar for vsearch operations.
#'
#' @param path (Character, default `NULL`) Explicit path to the vsearch
#'   executable. If `NULL`, the function searches the system PATH via
#'   [Sys.which()].
#'
#' @returns A character string with the path to vsearch, or `NA` if not
#'   found.
#' @export
#' @seealso [is_vsearch_installed()], [add_sh_to_taxonomy()]
#' @examples
#' find_vsearch()
find_vsearch <- function(path = NULL) {
  if (!is.null(path)) {
    return(path)
  }
  unname(Sys.which("vsearch"))
}


#' Check whether vsearch is installed
#'
#' @description
#' Tests whether the `vsearch` executable is available on the system.
#'
#' @param path (Character, default `NULL`) Explicit path to the vsearch
#'   executable. If `NULL`, the function searches the system PATH.
#'
#' @returns `TRUE` if vsearch is available, `FALSE` otherwise.
#' @export
#' @seealso [find_vsearch()], [add_sh_to_taxonomy()]
#' @examples
#' is_vsearch_installed()
is_vsearch_installed <- function(path = find_vsearch()) {
  !inherits(
    try(
      system2(path, "--version", stdout = TRUE, stderr = TRUE),
      silent = TRUE
    ),
    "try-error"
  )
}


# ——————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————
# add_sh_to_taxonomy()
# ——————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————

#' Annotate query sequences with UNITE Species Hypothesis (SH) names
#' #TODO WORK IN PROGRESS, very experimental
#'
#' @description
#' Runs `vsearch --usearch_global` to match query sequences against a
#' UNITE reference database, then extracts the Species Hypothesis (SH)
#' identifier from each best hit. The SH name is the first `|`-delimited
#' field in UNITE sequence identifiers (e.g. `SH123456.09FU`).
#'
#' This function ports the logic of the nf-core/ampliseq
#' `add_sh_to_taxonomy.py` script into R, using vsearch directly
#' instead of requiring external lookup tables.
#'
#' @param query_fasta (Character) Path to a FASTA file containing the
#'   query sequences (e.g. ASVs or OTUs).
#' @param unite_db (Character) Path to a UNITE reference FASTA file.
#'   The file can be in any format (SINTAX, UNITE default, etc.) as long
#'   as the sequence identifiers contain SH names as the first
#'   `|`-delimited field. Files downloaded via [download_unite_db()] meet
#'   this requirement.
#' @param vsearchpath (Character) Path to the vsearch executable.
#'   Defaults to [find_vsearch()].
#' @param id (Numeric, default `0.97`) Minimum sequence identity
#'   threshold (0–1) for vsearch `--id` parameter.
#' @param maxaccepts (Integer, default `1`) Maximum number of hits to
#'   accept per query. Set to `0` for unlimited hits (useful when
#'   multiple equally-good matches may have different SH names).
#' @param maxrejects (Integer, default `32`) Maximum number of
#'   rejected hits before stopping the search for a query.
#' @param nproc (Integer, default `1`) Number of threads for vsearch.
#' @param top_hits_only (Logical, default `TRUE`) If `TRUE`, only
#'   report the top hit per query (highest identity). If `FALSE`,
#'   report all accepted hits, which is useful for detecting
#'   ambiguous SH assignments.
#' @param keep_temporary_files (Logical, default `FALSE`) If `TRUE`,
#'   do not delete the temporary blast6 output file after parsing.
#' @param verbose (Logical, default `FALSE`) Print vsearch progress
#'   messages.
#'
#' @returns A data.frame with columns:
#'   \itemize{
#'     \item \code{query}: Query sequence identifier.
#'     \item \code{sh_name}: Species Hypothesis name extracted from the
#'       best database hit (e.g. `SH123456.09FU`), or \code{NA} if no
#'       hit was found.
#'     \item \code{target}: Full identifier of the matched database
#'       sequence.
#'     \item \code{pct_id}: Percent identity of the match.
#'     \item \code{aln_len}: Alignment length.
#'     \item \code{mismatches}: Number of mismatches.
#'     \item \code{e_value}: E-value of the match.
#'     \item \code{is_ambiguous}: Logical; `TRUE` if multiple hits with
#'       the same top identity disagree on the SH name.
#'   }
#' @export
#' @author Adrien Taudière
#' @seealso [download_unite_db()], [is_vsearch_installed()],
#'   [find_vsearch()]
#' @examples
#' \dontrun{
#' # Download a UNITE database first
#' unite_file <- download_unite_db(
#'   version = "10.0",
#'   taxonomic_format = "sintax",
#'   taxon_group = "fungi"
#' )
#'
#' # Annotate ASVs with SH names
#' sh_res <- add_sh_to_taxonomy( #TODO replace with a good fasta file
#'   query_fasta = "asvs.fasta",
#'   unite_db = unite_file,
#'   id = 0.97
#' )
#' head(sh_res)
#'
#' # Check for ambiguous assignments
#' sh_res[sh_res$is_ambiguous, ]
#' }
add_sh_to_taxonomy <- function(
  query_fasta,
  unite_db,
  vsearchpath = find_vsearch(),
  id = 0.97,
  maxaccepts = 1,
  maxrejects = 32,
  nproc = 1,
  top_hits_only = TRUE,
  keep_temporary_files = FALSE,
  verbose = FALSE
) {
  if (!is_vsearch_installed(vsearchpath)) {
    stop(
      "vsearch is not found at '", vsearchpath, "'. ",
      "Install vsearch or provide the path via the vsearchpath argument.",
      call. = FALSE
    )
  }

  if (!file.exists(query_fasta)) {
    stop("Query FASTA file not found: ", query_fasta, call. = FALSE)
  }

  if (!file.exists(unite_db)) {
    stop("UNITE database file not found: ", unite_db, call. = FALSE)
  }

  # Temporary output file for blast6 format
  blast6_file <- tempfile(pattern = "dbpq_blast6_", fileext = ".txt")
  on.exit(
    if (!keep_temporary_files && file.exists(blast6_file)) {
      unlink(blast6_file)
    },
    add = TRUE
  )

  # Build vsearch command
  # --blast6out format: query target pctId alnLen mismatches gapOpens qStart qEnd tStart tEnd eValue bitScore
  cmd_args <- paste0(
    " --usearch_global ", shQuote(query_fasta),
    " --db ", shQuote(unite_db),
    " --id ", id,
    " --maxaccepts ", maxaccepts,
    " --maxrejects ", maxrejects,
    " --blast6out ", shQuote(blast6_file),
    " --threads ", nproc,
    " --notrunclabels"
  )

  if (verbose) {
    message("Running vsearch --usearch_global...")
    message(paste0(vsearchpath, cmd_args))
  }

  vsearch_output <- system2(
    vsearchpath,
    args = cmd_args,
    stdout = TRUE,
    stderr = if (verbose) "" else FALSE
  )

  vsearch_status <- attr(vsearch_output, "status")
  if (!is.null(vsearch_status) && vsearch_status != 0) {
    stop(
      "vsearch --usearch_global failed with status ", vsearch_status, ".\n",
      paste(vsearch_output, collapse = "\n"),
      call. = FALSE
    )
  }

  if (!file.exists(blast6_file) || file.info(blast6_file)$size == 0) {
    if (verbose) {
      message("No matches found by vsearch.")
    }
    return(data.frame(
      query = character(0),
      sh_name = character(0),
      target = character(0),
      pct_id = numeric(0),
      aln_len = integer(0),
      mismatches = integer(0),
      e_value = numeric(0),
      is_ambiguous = logical(0),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    ))
  }

  # Parse blast6 output
  # Columns: query, target, pct_id, aln_len, mismatches, gap_opens,
  #          q_start, q_end, t_start, t_end, e_value, bit_score
  blast6 <- read.table(
    blast6_file,
    sep = "\t",
    header = FALSE,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  colnames(blast6) <- c(
    "query", "target", "pct_id", "aln_len",
    "mismatches", "gap_opens", "q_start", "q_end",
    "t_start", "t_end", "e_value", "bit_score"
  )

  # Extract SH name from target identifier.
  # UNITE headers: "SH123456.09FU|species_name|..." or
  #                "SH123456.09FU;tax=..." (SINTAX format)
  # The SH name is the first | or ; delimited part.
  blast6$sh_name <- vapply(
    blast6$target,
    function(target_id) {
      # Remove everything after | or ;
      sh <- strsplit(target_id, "[|;]")[[1]][1]
      # Verify it looks like an SH identifier (SH + digits + . + digits + FU)
      if (grepl("^SH[0-9]+\\.[0-9]+FU", sh)) {
        sh
      } else {
        NA_character_
      }
    },
    character(1)
  )

  if (top_hits_only) {
    # Keep only the best hit per query (highest pct_id, then longest aln_len)
    blast6 <- blast6[order(blast6$query, -blast6$pct_id, -blast6$aln_len), ]
    blast6 <- blast6[!duplicated(blast6$query), ]
    blast6$is_ambiguous <- FALSE
  } else {
    # Detect ambiguous assignments: queries with multiple top hits
    # that disagree on the SH name
    blast6 <- blast6[order(blast6$query, -blast6$pct_id, -blast6$aln_len), ]

    # For each query, check if top hits (same pct_id) disagree on SH
    blast6$is_ambiguous <- FALSE
    queries <- unique(blast6$query)
    for (q in queries) {
      idx <- which(blast6$query == q)
      top_pct <- blast6$pct_id[idx[1]]
      top_idx <- idx[blast6$pct_id[idx] == top_pct]
      sh_vals <- unique(blast6$sh_name[top_idx])
      sh_vals <- sh_vals[!is.na(sh_vals)]
      if (length(sh_vals) > 1) {
        blast6$is_ambiguous[top_idx] <- TRUE
      }
    }
  }

  # Select and order output columns
  result <- blast6[, c(
    "query", "sh_name", "target", "pct_id", "aln_len",
    "mismatches", "e_value", "is_ambiguous"
  )]
  rownames(result) <- NULL

  if (verbose) {
    n_matched <- sum(!is.na(result$sh_name))
    n_ambiguous <- sum(result$is_ambiguous)
    n_total <- length(unique(result$query))
    message(
      "SH annotation complete: ",
      n_matched, "/", n_total, " queries matched, ",
      n_ambiguous, " ambiguous assignments."
    )
  }

  return(result)
}

content.text: I now have a complete picture of all 27 exported functions. `dbpq` is file-based (FASTA databases), with one function (`count_unwanted_tax`) also accepting a phyloseq object. vsearch IS installed (so `add_sh_to_taxonomy` is testable), cutadapt is NOT, MiscMetabar IS installed. Let me consult the advisor before writing the script.

You're at the right point to call this, and your read is correct: file-based fixtures plus a single phyloseq fixture for `count_unwanted_tax` is the right shape — don't build the 12 generic phyloseq objects. Before you write, one thing blocks and the rest sharpens coverage.

## Blocking: the 10 download functions can't be "wrapped and called"

`tryCatch`/`withCallingHandlers` only catches a condition *after the call returns*. It does **not** protect you from `download.file()` actually succeeding (pulling a real multi-hundred-MB UNITE/SILVA archive into your fixture dir) or hanging on a slow connection. "Skip network" has to mean *don't invoke the download path*, not *call it and catch the error*.

But don't blanket-skip the functions either — most have an offline-reachable validation or instruction branch worth real coverage. Classify each:

| Function | Offline branch to TEST | Real-download path to SKIP |
|---|---|---|
| `download_eukaryome_db` | `url=NULL` → prints instructions, returns NULL | url given |
| `download_midori2_db` | `url=NULL` → instructions, returns NULL | url given |
| `download_diatbarcode_db` | `url=NULL` → instructions, returns NULL | url given |
| `download_bold_db` | `taxon=NULL` → error | valid taxon |
| `download_silva_db` | `target="LSU", format="dada2"` → error; bogus `version` → error | defaults |
| `download_greengenes2_db` | bogus `version` → error | defaults |
| `download_rdp_db` | bogus `trainset` → error | defaults |
| `download_unite_db` | (none — every path downloads) | all → SKIP |
| `download_pr2_db` | (none — version=NULL hits GitHub API, version set downloads) | all → SKIP |
| `download_marjaam_db` | (none — always downloads) | all → SKIP |

As a backstop in case a path slips through, set `options(timeout = 15)` at the top of the script so an accidental `download.file` fails fast instead of hanging the whole run.

## Output hygiene

The skill says only modify files in `audits/`. Write **every fixture and every `output=`/`output_path=` target to `tempfile()`/`tempdir()`** — never into `pqverse_pkg/dbpq/` or `audits/`. Only `dbpq_results.csv` lands in `audits/`. (Confirm the run command stays `cd .../pqverse && Rscript audits/dbpq_script.R` since the CSV path is relative.)

## To exercise happy paths, not just NA/empty returns

These fixtures need specific content or the function runs but its real logic never fires:

- **`add_sh_to_taxonomy`** (vsearch is installed — good): the SH-extraction regex is `^SH[0-9]+\.[0-9]+FU`. The shipped `example_unite.fasta` uses `>SH001|…`, which does **not** match → every `sh_name` comes back NA. Build your UNITE db fixture with real-style IDs like `SH123456.09FU|…` so the extraction path actually executes.
- **pr2 fixture**: `detect_tax_format` only returns `"pr2"` if a supergroup keyword (`TSAR`, `Amorphea`, `Alveolata`, …) appears. A 9-field positional header without one detects as `"unknown"`. Include the keyword.
- **`count_unwanted_tax`**: seed the phyloseq fixture's tax_table with actual hits (`"unclassified"`, `"Incertae_sedis"`, empty `g__`, NA) so the matching branch runs, and also test the file-path branch on a UNITE fixture salted with those values.
- **`cutadapt_rm_primers_db`** (cutadapt absent): use `cmd_is_run=FALSE` for the happy path (returns the command string offline). Optionally also call the default to capture the "cutadapt failed" error — both are legitimate audit rows.

One realistic-fixture note worth recording rather than fixing: for `unite` headers shaped `>ID|k__Fungi;p__…`, `.parse_tax_header` splits on `;` so the kingdom gets absorbed into the ID and is lost on conversion. That's the package's actual behavior on real UNITE headers — your conversion fixtures will surface it, which is exactly what the audit is for. Don't pre-correct your fixtures to hide it.

Nothing else blocks. Your fixture inventory and the offline-branch reasoning are sound — the download-safety classification is the one thing that, if you'd run the script as a naive "call everything in tryCatch," would have either hung or downloaded gigabytes.

All clear. The advisor's download-safety classification is the key insight — I'll test only offline-reachable branches and record the true-network functions as SKIP rows, with `options(timeout=15)` as a backstop. All fixtures and outputs go to `tempdir()`. Let me write the script.

input.content:
# ======================================================================
# External black-box audit script for the dbpq package
# ======================================================================
# Self-contained and re-runnable. Builds independent FASTA fixtures (and
# one phyloseq fixture for count_unwanted_tax) entirely in tempdir(),
# calls every exported function, and writes results to
# audits/dbpq_results.csv.
#
# Run from the workspace root:
#   cd /home/adrien/Nextcloud/IdEst/Projets/pqverse
#   Rscript audits/dbpq_script.R
#
# Network policy: download_*() functions that always hit the network are
# NOT invoked (recorded as SKIP). Only their offline-reachable
# validation / instruction branches are exercised. options(timeout=15)
# is a backstop so any accidental download fails fast.
# ======================================================================

options(timeout = 15)
set.seed(42)

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(Biostrings)
})

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Load the package (prefer current source via pkgload, fallback library)
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
pkg_dir <- "pqverse_pkg/dbpq"
loaded <- FALSE
if (requireNamespace("pkgload", quietly = TRUE) && dir.exists(pkg_dir)) {
  suppressMessages(pkgload::load_all(pkg_dir, quiet = TRUE))
  loaded <- TRUE
} else if (requireNamespace("devtools", quietly = TRUE) && dir.exists(pkg_dir)) {
  suppressMessages(devtools::load_all(pkg_dir, quiet = TRUE))
  loaded <- TRUE
}
if (!loaded) {
  library(dbpq)
}

has_phyloseq <- requireNamespace("phyloseq", quietly = TRUE)
has_vsearch <- isTRUE(tryCatch(is_vsearch_installed(), error = function(e) FALSE))
has_cutadapt <- nzchar(Sys.which("cutadapt"))

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Result accumulator + audit_call helper
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
.results <- list()
add_result <- function(df) {
  .results[[length(.results) + 1]] <<- df
}

audit_call <- function(fn_name, expr, test_label) {
  warn_msg <- NULL
  result <- tryCatch(
    withCallingHandlers(
      {
        force(expr)
        if (!is.null(warn_msg)) {
          list(status = "WARNING", message = warn_msg)
        } else {
          list(status = "OK", message = "")
        }
      },
      warning = function(w) {
        if (is.null(warn_msg)) {
          warn_msg <<- conditionMessage(w)
        }
        invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
      }
    ),
    error = function(e) list(status = "ERROR", message = conditionMessage(e))
  )
  msg <- gsub("[\r\n]+", " ", result$message)
  if (nchar(msg) > 400) {
    msg <- paste0(substr(msg, 1, 400), " [...]")
  }
  df <- data.frame(
    fn = fn_name,
    test = test_label,
    status = result$status,
    message = msg,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  add_result(df)
  invisible(df)
}

skip_row <- function(fn, test, reason) {
  add_result(data.frame(
    fn = fn,
    test = test,
    status = "SKIP",
    message = reason,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  ))
}

# A wrapper that swallows messages so the console stays readable.
quiet <- function(expr) {
  suppressMessages(expr)
}

# ======================================================================
# Build FASTA fixtures (all in tempdir)
# ======================================================================
fx <- tempfile("dbpq_audit_")
dir.create(fx)

make_seq <- function(n) {
  paste(sample(c("A", "T", "G", "C"), n, replace = TRUE), collapse = "")
}

write_fasta <- function(path, headers, seqs, gz = FALSE) {
  lines <- as.vector(rbind(paste0(">", headers), seqs))
  if (gz) {
    con <- gzfile(path, open = "w")
    on.exit(close(con))
    writeLines(lines, con)
  } else {
    writeLines(lines, path)
  }
  path
}

# Five shared sequences (used for db + query in add_sh_to_taxonomy)
seqs5 <- vapply(c(150, 148, 152, 149, 151), make_seq, character(1))

# --- UNITE format, SH-style IDs (so add_sh regex ^SH[0-9]+\.[0-9]+FU fires)
sh_ids <- c(
  "SH123456.09FU", "SH123457.09FU", "SH123458.09FU",
  "SH123459.09FU", "SH123460.09FU"
)
unite_tax <- c(
  "k__Fungi;p__Basidiomycota;c__Agaricomycetes;o__Agaricales;f__Amanitaceae;g__Amanita;s__Amanita_muscaria",
  "k__Fungi;p__Basidiomycota;c__Agaricomycetes;o__Agaricales;f__Amanitaceae;g__Amanita;s__Amanita_phalloides",
  "k__Fungi;p__Ascomycota;c__Sordariomycetes;o__Hypocreales;f__Nectriaceae;g__Fusarium;s__Fusarium_oxysporum",
  "k__Fungi;p__Ascomycota;c__Sordariomycetes;o__Hypocreales;f__Nectriaceae;g__Fusarium;s__Fusarium_solani",
  "k__Fungi;p__Basidiomycota;c__Agaricomycetes;o__Boletales;f__Boletaceae;g__Boletus;s__Boletus_edulis"
)
f_unite <- file.path(fx, "unite.fasta")
write_fasta(f_unite, paste0(sh_ids, "|", unite_tax), seqs5)

# Gzipped UNITE
f_gz <- file.path(fx, "unite.fasta.gz")
write_fasta(f_gz, paste0(sh_ids, "|", unite_tax), seqs5, gz = TRUE)

# --- SINTAX format
sintax_tax <- paste0(
  "tax=d:Bacteria,k:Bacteria,p:Pseudomonadota,c:Gammaproteobacteria,",
  "o:Enterobacterales,f:Enterobacteriaceae,g:Escherichia,s:coli"
)
f_sintax <- file.path(fx, "sintax.fasta")
write_fasta(
  f_sintax,
  paste0("ID", 1:3, ";", sintax_tax),
  vapply(c(120, 121, 122), make_seq, character(1))
)

# --- Greengenes2 format (d__ + space-separated ID)
gg2_tax <- paste0(
  "d__Bacteria;p__Pseudomonadota;c__Gammaproteobacteria;",
  "o__Enterobacterales;f__Enterobacteriaceae;g__Escherichia;s__coli"
)
f_gg2 <- file.path(fx, "gg2.fasta")
write_fasta(
  f_gg2,
  paste0("ID", 1:3, " ", gg2_tax),
  vapply(c(130, 131, 132), make_seq, character(1))
)

# --- PR2 positional format (9 levels, includes supergroup keyword TSAR)
pr2_tax <- "Eukaryota;TSAR;Alveolata;Dinoflagellata;Dinophyceae;Gymnodiniales;Gymnodiniaceae;Gymnodinium;Gymnodinium_sp"
f_pr2 <- file.path(fx, "pr2.fasta")
write_fasta(
  f_pr2,
  paste0("ID", 1:3, " ", pr2_tax),
  vapply(c(140, 141, 142), make_seq, character(1))
)

# --- dada2 positional, unprefixed (detect should be "unknown")
dada2_tax <- "Bacteria;Pseudomonadota;Gammaproteobacteria;Enterobacterales;Enterobacteriaceae;Escherichia;"
f_dada2 <- file.path(fx, "dada2.fasta")
write_fasta(
  f_dada2,
  rep(dada2_tax, 3),
  vapply(c(110, 111, 112), make_seq, character(1))
)

# --- UNITE format salted with unwanted / empty values
unwanted_tax <- c(
  "k__Fungi;p__unclassified;c__;o__Incertae_sedis;f__unknown;g__;s__",
  "k__Fungi;p__Ascomycota;c__uncultured;o__;f__environmental;g__metagenome;s__",
  "k__Fungi;p__Basidiomycota;c__Agaricomycetes;o__Agaricales;f__Amanitaceae;g__Amanita;s__Amanita_muscaria"
)
f_unwanted <- file.path(fx, "unwanted.fasta")
write_fasta(
  f_unwanted,
  paste0("ID", 1:3, ";", unwanted_tax),
  vapply(c(100, 101, 102), make_seq, character(1))
)

# --- Single-sequence file
f_single <- file.path(fx, "single.fasta")
write_fasta(f_single, paste0(sh_ids[1], "|", unite_tax[1]), seqs5[1])

# --- Headers with no taxonomy
f_notax <- file.path(fx, "notax.fasta")
write_fasta(f_notax, paste0("seq", 1:3), seqs5[1:3])

# --- Empty file (zero sequences)
f_empty <- file.path(fx, "empty.fasta")
file.create(f_empty)

# --- Query FASTA for add_sh_to_taxonomy (identical seqs => guaranteed hits)
f_query <- file.path(fx, "query.fasta")
write_fasta(f_query, paste0("query", 1:2), seqs5[1:2])

# --- phyloseq fixture for count_unwanted_tax (with NA + unwanted values)
pq_unwanted <- NULL
if (has_phyloseq) {
  otu <- matrix(
    c(10, 0, 5, 3, 7, 2),
    nrow = 3, ncol = 2,
    dimnames = list(paste0("t", 1:3), c("S1", "S2"))
  )
  tax <- matrix(
    c(
      "Fungi", "Ascomycota", "unclassified", "Hypocreales", "Nectriaceae", "Fusarium", NA,
      "Fungi", "Basidiomycota", "Agaricomycetes", "Agaricales", "Incertae_sedis", "unknown", "sp",
      "Fungi", "Ascomycota", "Sordariomycetes", "Hypocreales", "Nectriaceae", "Fusarium", "oxysporum"
    ),
    nrow = 3, byrow = TRUE,
    dimnames = list(
      paste0("t", 1:3),
      c("Kingdom", "Phylum", "Class", "Order", "Family", "Genus", "Species")
    )
  )
  pq_unwanted <- quiet(phyloseq::phyloseq(
    phyloseq::otu_table(otu, taxa_are_rows = TRUE),
    phyloseq::tax_table(tax)
  ))
}

# ======================================================================
# 1. utils.R  -- tax_prefixes, detect_tax_format, get_file_extension
# ======================================================================
audit_call("tax_prefixes", tax_prefixes("unite"), "format = unite")
audit_call("tax_prefixes", tax_prefixes("sintax"), "format = sintax")
audit_call("tax_prefixes", tax_prefixes("greengenes2"), "format = greengenes2")
audit_call("tax_prefixes", tax_prefixes("pr2"), "format = pr2 (positional)")
audit_call("tax_prefixes", tax_prefixes("bogus"), "invalid format (expect error)")

audit_call("detect_tax_format", detect_tax_format(f_unite), "unite fixture")
audit_call("detect_tax_format", detect_tax_format(f_sintax), "sintax fixture")
audit_call("detect_tax_format", detect_tax_format(f_gg2), "greengenes2 fixture")
audit_call("detect_tax_format", detect_tax_format(f_pr2), "pr2 fixture (supergroup keyword)")
audit_call("detect_tax_format", detect_tax_format(f_dada2), "dada2 unprefixed (expect unknown)")
audit_call("detect_tax_format", detect_tax_format(f_gz), "gzipped unite")
audit_call("detect_tax_format", detect_tax_format(f_empty), "empty file (expect unknown)")
audit_call("detect_tax_format", detect_tax_format(f_notax), "no taxonomy headers")

audit_call("get_file_extension", get_file_extension("db.fasta"), "single extension")
audit_call("get_file_extension", get_file_extension("db.fasta.gz"), "double extension")
audit_call("get_file_extension", get_file_extension("/a/b/c.tar.bz2"), "path with double ext")
audit_call("get_file_extension", get_file_extension("noextension"), "no extension (expect error)")

# ======================================================================
# 2. summarize.R -- count_seq_db, count_pattern_db, count_unwanted_tax,
#                   list_ranks_db, summarize_db
# ======================================================================
audit_call("count_seq_db", count_seq_db(f_unite), "unite (5 seqs)")
audit_call("count_seq_db", count_seq_db(f_gz), "gzipped unite")
audit_call("count_seq_db", count_seq_db(f_empty), "empty file (expect 0)")
audit_call("count_seq_db", count_seq_db(f_single), "single seq")

audit_call("count_pattern_db", count_pattern_db(f_unite, "Amanita"), "pattern Amanita")
audit_call("count_pattern_db", count_pattern_db(f_unite, "ZZZNOMATCH"), "pattern absent (expect 0)")
audit_call("count_pattern_db", count_pattern_db(f_gz, ">"), "gz default >")

audit_call("count_unwanted_tax", quiet(count_unwanted_tax(f_unwanted)), "file with unwanted values")
audit_call("count_unwanted_tax", quiet(count_unwanted_tax(f_unite)), "clean file (expect none)")
audit_call("count_unwanted_tax", quiet(count_unwanted_tax(f_unwanted, tax_format = "unite")), "explicit tax_format")
if (has_phyloseq) {
  audit_call("count_unwanted_tax", quiet(count_unwanted_tax(pq_unwanted)), "phyloseq with NA + unwanted")
} else {
  skip_row("count_unwanted_tax", "phyloseq input", "phyloseq not installed")
}

audit_call("list_ranks_db", list_ranks_db(f_unite, rank_prefix = "p__"), "unite rank_prefix p__")
audit_call("list_ranks_db", list_ranks_db(f_unite, tax_format = "unite"), "unite tax_format")
audit_call("list_ranks_db", list_ranks_db(f_sintax, tax_format = "sintax"), "sintax tax_format")
audit_call("list_ranks_db", list_ranks_db(f_gg2, tax_format = "greengenes2"), "greengenes2 tax_format")
audit_call("list_ranks_db", list_ranks_db(f_pr2, tax_format = "pr2"), "pr2 positional")
audit_call("list_ranks_db", list_ranks_db(f_pr2, rank_position = 2), "rank_position only (no tax_format)")
audit_call("list_ranks_db", list_ranks_db(f_empty, tax_format = "unite"), "empty file")

audit_call("summarize_db", quiet(summarize_db(f_unite)), "unite default prefixes")
audit_call("summarize_db", quiet(summarize_db(f_unite, tax_format = "unite")), "unite tax_format")
audit_call("summarize_db", quiet(summarize_db(f_unite, tax_format = "auto")), "auto-detect")
audit_call("summarize_db", quiet(summarize_db(f_sintax, tax_format = "sintax")), "sintax")
audit_call("summarize_db", quiet(summarize_db(f_pr2, tax_format = "pr2")), "pr2 positional")
audit_call("summarize_db", quiet(summarize_db(f_dada2, tax_format = "auto")), "dada2 auto (unknown->unite)")
audit_call("summarize_db", quiet(summarize_db(f_single)), "single seq")
audit_call("summarize_db", quiet(summarize_db(f_empty)), "empty file")

# ======================================================================
# 3. format.R -- format_fasta_db + wrappers
# ======================================================================
audit_call(
  "format_fasta_db",
  format_fasta_db(taxnames = "AB123;k__Fungi;p__Ascomycota;c__Sordariomycetes", output_format = "sintax"),
  "unite -> sintax (taxnames)"
)
audit_call(
  "format_fasta_db",
  format_fasta_db(taxnames = "AB123;tax=k:Fungi,p:Ascomycota", output_format = "unite"),
  "sintax -> unite (taxnames)"
)
audit_call(
  "format_fasta_db",
  format_fasta_db(taxnames = "abc d__Bacteria;p__Pseudomonadota;g__Escherichia", output_format = "dada2"),
  "greengenes2 -> dada2 (taxnames)"
)
audit_call(
  "format_fasta_db",
  format_fasta_db(taxnames = "AB123;k__Fungi;g__Aspergillus;s__fumigatus", output_format = "dada2_species"),
  "unite -> dada2_species (taxnames)"
)
audit_call(
  "format_fasta_db",
  format_fasta_db(fasta_db = f_unite, output_format = "sintax", output_path = file.path(fx, "out_sintax.fasta")),
  "fasta_db unite -> sintax (output_path)"
)
audit_call(
  "format_fasta_db",
  format_fasta_db(output_format = "sintax"),
  "neither taxnames nor fasta_db (expect error)"
)
audit_call(
  "format_fasta_db",
  format_fasta_db(fasta_db = f_unite, taxnames = "x", output_format = "sintax"),
  "both inputs (expect error)"
)
audit_call(
  "format_fasta_db",
  format_fasta_db(taxnames = "plain_no_tax_string", output_format = "sintax"),
  "undetectable input (expect error)"
)

audit_call("format2sintax", format2sintax(taxnames = "AB123;k__Fungi;p__Ascomycota"), "unite taxnames")
audit_call("format2sintax", format2sintax(taxnames = "abc d__Bacteria;p__X", input_format = "greengenes2"), "gg2 explicit input")
audit_call("format2dada2", format2dada2(taxnames = "AB123;tax=k:Fungi,p:Ascomycota"), "sintax taxnames")
audit_call("format2dada2", format2dada2(taxnames = "AB123;k__Fungi;p__Ascomycota", input_format = "unite", pattern_to_remove = "Fungi"), "with pattern_to_remove")
audit_call("format2dada2_species", format2dada2_species(taxnames = "AB123;k__Fungi;g__Aspergillus;s__fumigatus"), "unite taxnames")
audit_call("format2dada2_species", format2dada2_species(taxnames = "AB123;tax=k:Fungi,g:Aspergillus,s:fumigatus", input_format = "sintax"), "sintax taxnames")

# ======================================================================
# 4. modify.R -- filter_db, cutadapt_rm_primers_db
# ======================================================================
audit_call("filter_db", quiet(filter_db(f_unite, "Amanita", output = file.path(fx, "filt1.fasta"))), "filter Amanita")
audit_call("filter_db", quiet(filter_db(f_gz, "Fusarium", output = file.path(fx, "filt2.fasta"))), "filter gz Fusarium")
audit_call("filter_db", quiet(filter_db(f_unite, "ZZZNOMATCH", output = file.path(fx, "filt3.fasta"))), "pattern absent")
audit_call("filter_db", filter_db(f_unite, "Amanita"), "missing output (expect error)")

audit_call(
  "cutadapt_rm_primers_db",
  cutadapt_rm_primers_db(f_unite, output = file.path(fx, "ct.fasta"), primer_fw = "GCATCGATGAAGAACGCAGC", primer_rev = "TCCTCCGCTTATTGATATGC", cmd_is_run = FALSE),
  "cmd_is_run = FALSE (return command string)"
)
if (has_cutadapt) {
  audit_call(
    "cutadapt_rm_primers_db",
    quiet(cutadapt_rm_primers_db(f_unite, output = file.path(fx, "ct2.fasta"), primer_fw = "GCATCGATGAAGAACGCAGC", primer_rev = "TCCTCCGCTTATTGATATGC")),
    "cmd_is_run = TRUE (cutadapt installed)"
  )
} else {
  audit_call(
    "cutadapt_rm_primers_db",
    quiet(cutadapt_rm_primers_db(f_unite, output = file.path(fx, "ct2.fasta"), primer_fw = "GCATCGATGAAGAACGCAGC", primer_rev = "TCCTCCGCTTATTGATATGC")),
    "cmd_is_run = TRUE (cutadapt absent, expect error)"
  )
}

# ======================================================================
# 5. annotate.R -- find_vsearch, is_vsearch_installed, add_sh_to_taxonomy
# ======================================================================
audit_call("find_vsearch", find_vsearch(), "default (PATH lookup)")
audit_call("find_vsearch", find_vsearch(path = "/custom/vsearch"), "explicit path (returns as-is)")
audit_call("is_vsearch_installed", is_vsearch_installed(), "default")
audit_call("is_vsearch_installed", is_vsearch_installed(path = "/nonexistent/vsearch"), "bad path (expect FALSE)")

if (has_vsearch) {
  audit_call(
    "add_sh_to_taxonomy",
    quiet(add_sh_to_taxonomy(query_fasta = f_query, unite_db = f_unite, id = 0.9)),
    "vsearch happy path (SH IDs in db)"
  )
  audit_call(
    "add_sh_to_taxonomy",
    quiet(add_sh_to_taxonomy(query_fasta = f_query, unite_db = f_unite, id = 0.9, top_hits_only = FALSE, maxaccepts = 0)),
    "all hits / ambiguity detection"
  )
  audit_call(
    "add_sh_to_taxonomy",
    add_sh_to_taxonomy(query_fasta = "/no/such/file.fasta", unite_db = f_unite),
    "missing query file (expect error)"
  )
} else {
  skip_row("add_sh_to_taxonomy", "vsearch happy path", "vsearch not installed")
}

# ======================================================================
# 6. download.R -- offline branches only; network paths SKIPPED
# ======================================================================
tdir <- file.path(fx, "dl")
dir.create(tdir, showWarnings = FALSE)

# Instruction / NULL-return branches (no network)
audit_call("download_eukaryome_db", quiet(download_eukaryome_db(dest_dir = tdir, url = NULL)), "url=NULL instructions (no network)")
audit_call("download_midori2_db", quiet(download_midori2_db(dest_dir = tdir, url = NULL)), "url=NULL instructions (no network)")
audit_call("download_diatbarcode_db", quiet(download_diatbarcode_db(dest_dir = tdir, url = NULL)), "url=NULL instructions (no network)")

# Validation-error branches reached before any download.file() call
audit_call("download_bold_db", download_bold_db(dest_dir = tdir, taxon = NULL), "taxon=NULL (expect validation error)")
audit_call("download_silva_db", download_silva_db(dest_dir = tdir, target = "LSU", format = "dada2"), "LSU+dada2 (expect validation error)")
audit_call("download_silva_db", download_silva_db(dest_dir = tdir, version = "999.9"), "unknown version (expect error before download)")
audit_call("download_greengenes2_db", download_greengenes2_db(dest_dir = tdir, version = "1900.01"), "unknown version (expect error)")
audit_call("download_rdp_db", download_rdp_db(dest_dir = tdir, trainset = "999"), "unknown trainset (expect error)")

# Functions whose every path performs a real network download -> SKIP
skip_row("download_unite_db", "all paths", "always downloads (network)")
skip_row("download_pr2_db", "all paths", "always downloads / GitHub API (network)")
skip_row("download_marjaam_db", "all paths", "always downloads (network)")
skip_row("download_silva_db", "default happy path", "real download (network)")
skip_row("download_greengenes2_db", "default happy path", "real download (network)")
skip_row("download_rdp_db", "default happy path", "real download (network)")
skip_row("download_bold_db", "valid taxon", "real BOLD API download (network)")
skip_row("download_eukaryome_db", "url given", "real download (network)")
skip_row("download_midori2_db", "url given", "real download (network)")
skip_row("download_diatbarcode_db", "url given", "real download (network)")
skip_row("download_unite_db", "doi / sintax / default", "real download (network)")

# ======================================================================
# Write results
# ======================================================================
audit_results <- do.call(rbind, .results)
out_csv <- "audits/dbpq_results.csv"
write.csv(audit_results, out_csv, row.names = FALSE)

cat("\nAudit complete:", nrow(audit_results), "tests run\n")
cat("OK:     ", sum(audit_results$status == "OK"), "\n")
cat("WARNING:", sum(audit_results$status == "WARNING"), "\n")
cat("ERROR:  ", sum(audit_results$status == "ERROR"), "\n")
cat("SKIP:   ", sum(audit_results$status == "SKIP"), "\n")
cat("\nResults written to", out_csv, "\n")

# Cleanup fixtures
unlink(fx, recursive = TRUE)

input.content:
# ======================================================================
# External black-box audit script for the dbpq package
# ======================================================================
# Self-contained and re-runnable. Builds independent FASTA fixtures (and
# one phyloseq fixture for count_unwanted_tax) entirely in tempdir(),
# calls every exported function, and writes results to
# audits/dbpq_results.csv.
#
# Run from the workspace root:
#   cd /home/adrien/Nextcloud/IdEst/Projets/pqverse
#   Rscript audits/dbpq_script.R
#
# Network policy: download_*() functions that always hit the network are
# NOT invoked (recorded as SKIP). Only their offline-reachable
# validation / instruction branches are exercised. options(timeout=15)
# is a backstop so any accidental download fails fast.
# ======================================================================

options(timeout = 15)
set.seed(42)

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(Biostrings)
})

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Load the package (prefer current source via pkgload, fallback library)
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
pkg_dir <- "pqverse_pkg/dbpq"
loaded <- FALSE
if (requireNamespace("pkgload", quietly = TRUE) && dir.exists(pkg_dir)) {
  suppressMessages(pkgload::load_all(pkg_dir, quiet = TRUE))
  loaded <- TRUE
} else if (requireNamespace("devtools", quietly = TRUE) && dir.exists(pkg_dir)) {
  suppressMessages(devtools::load_all(pkg_dir, quiet = TRUE))
  loaded <- TRUE
}
if (!loaded) {
  library(dbpq)
}

has_phyloseq <- requireNamespace("phyloseq", quietly = TRUE)
has_vsearch <- isTRUE(tryCatch(is_vsearch_installed(), error = function(e) FALSE))
has_cutadapt <- nzchar(Sys.which("cutadapt"))

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Result accumulator + audit_call helper
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
.results <- list()
add_result <- function(df) {
  .results[[length(.results) + 1]] <<- df
}

audit_call <- function(fn_name, expr, test_label) {
  warn_msg <- NULL
  result <- tryCatch(
    withCallingHandlers(
      {
        force(expr)
        if (!is.null(warn_msg)) {
          list(status = "WARNING", message = warn_msg)
        } else {
          list(status = "OK", message = "")
        }
      },
      warning = function(w) {
        if (is.null(warn_msg)) {
          warn_msg <<- conditionMessage(w)
        }
        invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
      }
    ),
    error = function(e) list(status = "ERROR", message = conditionMessage(e))
  )
  msg <- gsub("[\r\n]+", " ", result$message)
  if (nchar(msg) > 400) {
    msg <- paste0(substr(msg, 1, 400), " [...]")
  }
  df <- data.frame(
    fn = fn_name,
    test = test_label,
    status = result$status,
    message = msg,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  add_result(df)
  invisible(df)
}

skip_row <- function(fn, test, reason) {
  add_result(data.frame(
    fn = fn,
    test = test,
    status = "SKIP",
    message = reason,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  ))
}

# Swallow messages so the console stays readable.
quiet <- function(expr) {
  suppressMessages(expr)
}

# ======================================================================
# Build FASTA fixtures (all in tempdir)
# ======================================================================
fx <- tempfile("dbpq_audit_")
dir.create(fx)

make_seq <- function(n) {
  paste(sample(c("A", "T", "G", "C"), n, replace = TRUE), collapse = "")
}

write_fasta <- function(path, headers, seqs, gz = FALSE) {
  lines <- as.vector(rbind(paste0(">", headers), seqs))
  if (gz) {
    con <- gzfile(path, open = "w")
    on.exit(close(con))
    writeLines(lines, con)
  } else {
    writeLines(lines, path)
  }
  path
}

# Five shared sequences (used for db + query in add_sh_to_taxonomy)
seqs5 <- vapply(c(150, 148, 152, 149, 151), make_seq, character(1))

# --- UNITE format, SH-style IDs (so add_sh regex ^SH[0-9]+\.[0-9]+FU fires)
sh_ids <- c(
  "SH123456.09FU", "SH123457.09FU", "SH123458.09FU",
  "SH123459.09FU", "SH123460.09FU"
)
unite_tax <- c(
  "k__Fungi;p__Basidiomycota;c__Agaricomycetes;o__Agaricales;f__Amanitaceae;g__Amanita;s__Amanita_muscaria",
  "k__Fungi;p__Basidiomycota;c__Agaricomycetes;o__Agaricales;f__Amanitaceae;g__Amanita;s__Amanita_phalloides",
  "k__Fungi;p__Ascomycota;c__Sordariomycetes;o__Hypocreales;f__Nectriaceae;g__Fusarium;s__Fusarium_oxysporum",
  "k__Fungi;p__Ascomycota;c__Sordariomycetes;o__Hypocreales;f__Nectriaceae;g__Fusarium;s__Fusarium_solani",
  "k__Fungi;p__Basidiomycota;c__Agaricomycetes;o__Boletales;f__Boletaceae;g__Boletus;s__Boletus_edulis"
)
f_unite <- file.path(fx, "unite.fasta")
write_fasta(f_unite, paste0(sh_ids, "|", unite_tax), seqs5)

# Gzipped UNITE
f_gz <- file.path(fx, "unite.fasta.gz")
write_fasta(f_gz, paste0(sh_ids, "|", unite_tax), seqs5, gz = TRUE)

# --- SINTAX format
sintax_tax <- paste0(
  "tax=d:Bacteria,k:Bacteria,p:Pseudomonadota,c:Gammaproteobacteria,",
  "o:Enterobacterales,f:Enterobacteriaceae,g:Escherichia,s:coli"
)
f_sintax <- file.path(fx, "sintax.fasta")
write_fasta(
  f_sintax,
  paste0("ID", 1:3, ";", sintax_tax),
  vapply(c(120, 121, 122), make_seq, character(1))
)

# --- Greengenes2 format (d__ + space-separated ID)
gg2_tax <- paste0(
  "d__Bacteria;p__Pseudomonadota;c__Gammaproteobacteria;",
  "o__Enterobacterales;f__Enterobacteriaceae;g__Escherichia;s__coli"
)
f_gg2 <- file.path(fx, "gg2.fasta")
write_fasta(
  f_gg2,
  paste0("ID", 1:3, " ", gg2_tax),
  vapply(c(130, 131, 132), make_seq, character(1))
)

# --- PR2 positional format (9 levels, includes supergroup keyword TSAR)
pr2_tax <- "Eukaryota;TSAR;Alveolata;Dinoflagellata;Dinophyceae;Gymnodiniales;Gymnodiniaceae;Gymnodinium;Gymnodinium_sp"
f_pr2 <- file.path(fx, "pr2.fasta")
write_fasta(
  f_pr2,
  paste0("ID", 1:3, " ", pr2_tax),
  vapply(c(140, 141, 142), make_seq, character(1))
)

# --- dada2 positional, unprefixed (detect should be "unknown")
dada2_tax <- "Bacteria;Pseudomonadota;Gammaproteobacteria;Enterobacterales;Enterobacteriaceae;Escherichia;"
f_dada2 <- file.path(fx, "dada2.fasta")
write_fasta(
  f_dada2,
  rep(dada2_tax, 3),
  vapply(c(110, 111, 112), make_seq, character(1))
)

# --- UNITE format salted with unwanted / empty values
unwanted_tax <- c(
  "k__Fungi;p__unclassified;c__;o__Incertae_sedis;f__unknown;g__;s__",
  "k__Fungi;p__Ascomycota;c__uncultured;o__;f__environmental;g__metagenome;s__",
  "k__Fungi;p__Basidiomycota;c__Agaricomycetes;o__Agaricales;f__Amanitaceae;g__Amanita;s__Amanita_muscaria"
)
f_unwanted <- file.path(fx, "unwanted.fasta")
write_fasta(
  f_unwanted,
  paste0("ID", 1:3, ";", unwanted_tax),
  vapply(c(100, 101, 102), make_seq, character(1))
)

# --- Single-sequence file
f_single <- file.path(fx, "single.fasta")
write_fasta(f_single, paste0(sh_ids[1], "|", unite_tax[1]), seqs5[1])

# --- Headers with no taxonomy
f_notax <- file.path(fx, "notax.fasta")
write_fasta(f_notax, paste0("seq", 1:3), seqs5[1:3])

# --- Empty file (zero sequences)
f_empty <- file.path(fx, "empty.fasta")
file.create(f_empty)

# --- Query FASTA for add_sh_to_taxonomy (identical seqs => guaranteed hits)
f_query <- file.path(fx, "query.fasta")
write_fasta(f_query, paste0("query", 1:2), seqs5[1:2])

# --- phyloseq fixture for count_unwanted_tax (with NA + unwanted values)
pq_unwanted <- NULL
if (has_phyloseq) {
  otu <- matrix(
    c(10, 0, 5, 3, 7, 2),
    nrow = 3, ncol = 2,
    dimnames = list(paste0("t", 1:3), c("S1", "S2"))
  )
  tax <- matrix(
    c(
      "Fungi", "Ascomycota", "unclassified", "Hypocreales", "Nectriaceae", "Fusarium", NA,
      "Fungi", "Basidiomycota", "Agaricomycetes", "Agaricales", "Incertae_sedis", "unknown", "sp",
      "Fungi", "Ascomycota", "Sordariomycetes", "Hypocreales", "Nectriaceae", "Fusarium", "oxysporum"
    ),
    nrow = 3, byrow = TRUE,
    dimnames = list(
      paste0("t", 1:3),
      c("Kingdom", "Phylum", "Class", "Order", "Family", "Genus", "Species")
    )
  )
  pq_unwanted <- quiet(phyloseq::phyloseq(
    phyloseq::otu_table(otu, taxa_are_rows = TRUE),
    phyloseq::tax_table(tax)
  ))
}

# ======================================================================
# 1. utils.R  -- tax_prefixes, detect_tax_format, get_file_extension
# ======================================================================
audit_call("tax_prefixes", tax_prefixes("unite"), "format = unite")
audit_call("tax_prefixes", tax_prefixes("sintax"), "format = sintax")
audit_call("tax_prefixes", tax_prefixes("greengenes2"), "format = greengenes2")
audit_call("tax_prefixes", tax_prefixes("pr2"), "format = pr2 (positional)")
audit_call("tax_prefixes", tax_prefixes("bogus"), "invalid format (expect error)")

audit_call("detect_tax_format", detect_tax_format(f_unite), "unite fixture")
audit_call("detect_tax_format", detect_tax_format(f_sintax), "sintax fixture")
audit_call("detect_tax_format", detect_tax_format(f_gg2), "greengenes2 fixture")
audit_call("detect_tax_format", detect_tax_format(f_pr2), "pr2 fixture (supergroup keyword)")
audit_call("detect_tax_format", detect_tax_format(f_dada2), "dada2 unprefixed (expect unknown)")
audit_call("detect_tax_format", detect_tax_format(f_gz), "gzipped unite")
audit_call("detect_tax_format", detect_tax_format(f_empty), "empty file (expect unknown)")
audit_call("detect_tax_format", detect_tax_format(f_notax), "no taxonomy headers")

audit_call("get_file_extension", get_file_extension("db.fasta"), "single extension")
audit_call("get_file_extension", get_file_extension("db.fasta.gz"), "double extension")
audit_call("get_file_extension", get_file_extension("/a/b/c.tar.bz2"), "path with double ext")
audit_call("get_file_extension", get_file_extension("noextension"), "no extension (expect error)")

# ======================================================================
# 2. summarize.R -- count_seq_db, count_pattern_db, count_unwanted_tax,
#                   list_ranks_db, summarize_db
# ======================================================================
audit_call("count_seq_db", count_seq_db(f_unite), "unite (5 seqs)")
audit_call("count_seq_db", count_seq_db(f_gz), "gzipped unite")
audit_call("count_seq_db", count_seq_db(f_empty), "empty file (expect 0)")
audit_call("count_seq_db", count_seq_db(f_single), "single seq")

audit_call("count_pattern_db", count_pattern_db(f_unite, "Amanita"), "pattern Amanita")
audit_call("count_pattern_db", count_pattern_db(f_unite, "ZZZNOMATCH"), "pattern absent (expect 0)")
audit_call("count_pattern_db", count_pattern_db(f_gz, ">"), "gz default >")

audit_call("count_unwanted_tax", quiet(count_unwanted_tax(f_unwanted)), "file with unwanted values")
audit_call("count_unwanted_tax", quiet(count_unwanted_tax(f_unite)), "clean file (expect none)")
audit_call("count_unwanted_tax", quiet(count_unwanted_tax(f_unwanted, tax_format = "unite")), "explicit tax_format")
if (has_phyloseq) {
  audit_call("count_unwanted_tax", quiet(count_unwanted_tax(pq_unwanted)), "phyloseq with NA + unwanted")
} else {
  skip_row("count_unwanted_tax", "phyloseq input", "phyloseq not installed")
}

audit_call("list_ranks_db", list_ranks_db(f_unite, rank_prefix = "p__"), "unite rank_prefix p__")
audit_call("list_ranks_db", list_ranks_db(f_unite, tax_format = "unite"), "unite tax_format")
audit_call("list_ranks_db", list_ranks_db(f_sintax, tax_format = "sintax"), "sintax tax_format")
audit_call("list_ranks_db", list_ranks_db(f_gg2, tax_format = "greengenes2"), "greengenes2 tax_format")
audit_call("list_ranks_db", list_ranks_db(f_pr2, tax_format = "pr2"), "pr2 positional")
audit_call("list_ranks_db", list_ranks_db(f_pr2, rank_position = 2), "rank_position only (no tax_format)")
audit_call("list_ranks_db", list_ranks_db(f_empty, tax_format = "unite"), "empty file")

audit_call("summarize_db", quiet(summarize_db(f_unite)), "unite default prefixes")
audit_call("summarize_db", quiet(summarize_db(f_unite, tax_format = "unite")), "unite tax_format")
audit_call("summarize_db", quiet(summarize_db(f_unite, tax_format = "auto")), "auto-detect")
audit_call("summarize_db", quiet(summarize_db(f_sintax, tax_format = "sintax")), "sintax")
audit_call("summarize_db", quiet(summarize_db(f_pr2, tax_format = "pr2")), "pr2 positional")
audit_call("summarize_db", quiet(summarize_db(f_dada2, tax_format = "auto")), "dada2 auto (unknown->unite)")
audit_call("summarize_db", quiet(summarize_db(f_single)), "single seq")
audit_call("summarize_db", quiet(summarize_db(f_empty)), "empty file")

# ======================================================================
# 3. format.R -- format_fasta_db + wrappers
# ======================================================================
audit_call(
  "format_fasta_db",
  format_fasta_db(taxnames = "AB123;k__Fungi;p__Ascomycota;c__Sordariomycetes", output_format = "sintax"),
  "unite -> sintax (taxnames)"
)
audit_call(
  "format_fasta_db",
  format_fasta_db(taxnames = "AB123;tax=k:Fungi,p:Ascomycota", output_format = "unite"),
  "sintax -> unite (taxnames)"
)
audit_call(
  "format_fasta_db",
  format_fasta_db(taxnames = "abc d__Bacteria;p__Pseudomonadota;g__Escherichia", output_format = "dada2"),
  "greengenes2 -> dada2 (taxnames)"
)
audit_call(
  "format_fasta_db",
  format_fasta_db(taxnames = "AB123;k__Fungi;g__Aspergillus;s__fumigatus", output_format = "dada2_species"),
  "unite -> dada2_species (taxnames)"
)
audit_call(
  "format_fasta_db",
  format_fasta_db(fasta_db = f_unite, output_format = "sintax", output_path = file.path(fx, "out_sintax.fasta")),
  "fasta_db unite -> sintax (output_path)"
)
audit_call(
  "format_fasta_db",
  format_fasta_db(output_format = "sintax"),
  "neither taxnames nor fasta_db (expect error)"
)
audit_call(
  "format_fasta_db",
  format_fasta_db(fasta_db = f_unite, taxnames = "x", output_format = "sintax"),
  "both inputs (expect error)"
)
audit_call(
  "format_fasta_db",
  format_fasta_db(taxnames = "plain_no_tax_string", output_format = "sintax"),
  "undetectable input (expect error)"
)

audit_call("format2sintax", format2sintax(taxnames = "AB123;k__Fungi;p__Ascomycota"), "unite taxnames")
audit_call("format2sintax", format2sintax(taxnames = "abc d__Bacteria;p__X", input_format = "greengenes2"), "gg2 explicit input")
audit_call("format2dada2", format2dada2(taxnames = "AB123;tax=k:Fungi,p:Ascomycota"), "sintax taxnames")
audit_call("format2dada2", format2dada2(taxnames = "AB123;k__Fungi;p__Ascomycota", input_format = "unite", pattern_to_remove = "Fungi"), "with pattern_to_remove")
audit_call("format2dada2_species", format2dada2_species(taxnames = "AB123;k__Fungi;g__Aspergillus;s__fumigatus"), "unite taxnames")
audit_call("format2dada2_species", format2dada2_species(taxnames = "AB123;tax=k:Fungi,g:Aspergillus,s:fumigatus", input_format = "sintax"), "sintax taxnames")

# ======================================================================
# 4. modify.R -- filter_db, cutadapt_rm_primers_db
# ======================================================================
audit_call("filter_db", quiet(filter_db(f_unite, "Amanita", output = file.path(fx, "filt1.fasta"))), "filter Amanita")
audit_call("filter_db", quiet(filter_db(f_gz, "Fusarium", output = file.path(fx, "filt2.fasta"))), "filter gz Fusarium")
audit_call("filter_db", quiet(filter_db(f_unite, "ZZZNOMATCH", output = file.path(fx, "filt3.fasta"))), "pattern absent")
audit_call("filter_db", filter_db(f_unite, "Amanita"), "missing output (expect error)")

audit_call(
  "cutadapt_rm_primers_db",
  cutadapt_rm_primers_db(f_unite, output = file.path(fx, "ct.fasta"), primer_fw = "GCATCGATGAAGAACGCAGC", primer_rev = "TCCTCCGCTTATTGATATGC", cmd_is_run = FALSE),
  "cmd_is_run = FALSE (return command string)"
)
if (has_cutadapt) {
  audit_call(
    "cutadapt_rm_primers_db",
    quiet(cutadapt_rm_primers_db(f_unite, output = file.path(fx, "ct2.fasta"), primer_fw = "GCATCGATGAAGAACGCAGC", primer_rev = "TCCTCCGCTTATTGATATGC")),
    "cmd_is_run = TRUE (cutadapt installed)"
  )
} else {
  audit_call(
    "cutadapt_rm_primers_db",
    quiet(cutadapt_rm_primers_db(f_unite, output = file.path(fx, "ct2.fasta"), primer_fw = "GCATCGATGAAGAACGCAGC", primer_rev = "TCCTCCGCTTATTGATATGC")),
    "cmd_is_run = TRUE (cutadapt absent, expect error)"
  )
}

# ======================================================================
# 5. annotate.R -- find_vsearch, is_vsearch_installed, add_sh_to_taxonomy
# ======================================================================
audit_call("find_vsearch", find_vsearch(), "default (PATH lookup)")
audit_call("find_vsearch", find_vsearch(path = "/custom/vsearch"), "explicit path (returns as-is)")
audit_call("is_vsearch_installed", is_vsearch_installed(), "default")
audit_call("is_vsearch_installed", is_vsearch_installed(path = "/nonexistent/vsearch"), "bad path (expect FALSE)")

if (has_vsearch) {
  audit_call(
    "add_sh_to_taxonomy",
    quiet(add_sh_to_taxonomy(query_fasta = f_query, unite_db = f_unite, id = 0.9)),
    "vsearch happy path (SH IDs in db)"
  )
  audit_call(
    "add_sh_to_taxonomy",
    quiet(add_sh_to_taxonomy(query_fasta = f_query, unite_db = f_unite, id = 0.9, top_hits_only = FALSE, maxaccepts = 0)),
    "all hits / ambiguity detection"
  )
  audit_call(
    "add_sh_to_taxonomy",
    add_sh_to_taxonomy(query_fasta = "/no/such/file.fasta", unite_db = f_unite),
    "missing query file (expect error)"
  )
} else {
  skip_row("add_sh_to_taxonomy", "vsearch happy path", "vsearch not installed")
}

# ======================================================================
# 6. download.R -- offline branches only; network paths SKIPPED
# ======================================================================
tdir <- file.path(fx, "dl")
dir.create(tdir, showWarnings = FALSE)

# Instruction / NULL-return branches (no network)
audit_call("download_eukaryome_db", quiet(download_eukaryome_db(dest_dir = tdir, url = NULL)), "url=NULL instructions (no network)")
audit_call("download_midori2_db", quiet(download_midori2_db(dest_dir = tdir, url = NULL)), "url=NULL instructions (no network)")
audit_call("download_diatbarcode_db", quiet(download_diatbarcode_db(dest_dir = tdir, url = NULL)), "url=NULL instructions (no network)")

# Validation-error branches reached before any download.file() call
audit_call("download_bold_db", download_bold_db(dest_dir = tdir, taxon = NULL), "taxon=NULL (expect validation error)")
audit_call("download_silva_db", download_silva_db(dest_dir = tdir, target = "LSU", format = "dada2"), "LSU+dada2 (expect validation error)")
audit_call("download_silva_db", download_silva_db(dest_dir = tdir, version = "999.9"), "unknown version (expect error before download)")
audit_call("download_greengenes2_db", download_greengenes2_db(dest_dir = tdir, version = "1900.01"), "unknown version (expect error)")
audit_call("download_rdp_db", download_rdp_db(dest_dir = tdir, trainset = "999"), "unknown trainset (expect error)")

# Functions whose every (non-error) path performs a real network download -> SKIP
skip_row("download_unite_db", "doi / sintax / default", "real download (network)")
skip_row("download_pr2_db", "all paths", "always downloads / GitHub API (network)")
skip_row("download_marjaam_db", "all paths", "always downloads (network)")
skip_row("download_silva_db", "default happy path", "real download (network)")
skip_row("download_greengenes2_db", "default happy path", "real download (network)")
skip_row("download_rdp_db", "default happy path", "real download (network)")
skip_row("download_bold_db", "valid taxon", "real BOLD API download (network)")
skip_row("download_eukaryome_db", "url given", "real download (network)")
skip_row("download_midori2_db", "url given", "real download (network)")
skip_row("download_diatbarcode_db", "url given", "real download (network)")

# ======================================================================
# Write results
# ======================================================================
audit_results <- do.call(rbind, .results)
out_csv <- "audits/dbpq_results.csv"
write.csv(audit_results, out_csv, row.names = FALSE)

cat("\nAudit complete:", nrow(audit_results), "tests run\n")
cat("OK:     ", sum(audit_results$status == "OK"), "\n")
cat("WARNING:", sum(audit_results$status == "WARNING"), "\n")
cat("ERROR:  ", sum(audit_results$status == "ERROR"), "\n")
cat("SKIP:   ", sum(audit_results$status == "SKIP"), "\n")
cat("\nResults written to", out_csv, "\n")

# Cleanup fixtures
unlink(fx, recursive = TRUE)

toolUseResult.content:
# ======================================================================
# External black-box audit script for the dbpq package
# ======================================================================
# Self-contained and re-runnable. Builds independent FASTA fixtures (and
# one phyloseq fixture for count_unwanted_tax) entirely in tempdir(),
# calls every exported function, and writes results to
# audits/dbpq_results.csv.
#
# Run from the workspace root:
#   cd /home/adrien/Nextcloud/IdEst/Projets/pqverse
#   Rscript audits/dbpq_script.R
#
# Network policy: download_*() functions that always hit the network are
# NOT invoked (recorded as SKIP). Only their offline-reachable
# validation / instruction branches are exercised. options(timeout=15)
# is a backstop so any accidental download fails fast.
# ======================================================================

options(timeout = 15)
set.seed(42)

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(Biostrings)
})

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Load the package (prefer current source via pkgload, fallback library)
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
pkg_dir <- "pqverse_pkg/dbpq"
loaded <- FALSE
if (requireNamespace("pkgload", quietly = TRUE) && dir.exists(pkg_dir)) {
  suppressMessages(pkgload::load_all(pkg_dir, quiet = TRUE))
  loaded <- TRUE
} else if (requireNamespace("devtools", quietly = TRUE) && dir.exists(pkg_dir)) {
  suppressMessages(devtools::load_all(pkg_dir, quiet = TRUE))
  loaded <- TRUE
}
if (!loaded) {
  library(dbpq)
}

has_phyloseq <- requireNamespace("phyloseq", quietly = TRUE)
has_vsearch <- isTRUE(tryCatch(is_vsearch_installed(), error = function(e) FALSE))
has_cutadapt <- nzchar(Sys.which("cutadapt"))

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Result accumulator + audit_call helper
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
.results <- list()
add_result <- function(df) {
  .results[[length(.results) + 1]] <<- df
}

audit_call <- function(fn_name, expr, test_label) {
  warn_msg <- NULL
  result <- tryCatch(
    withCallingHandlers(
      {
        force(expr)
        if (!is.null(warn_msg)) {
          list(status = "WARNING", message = warn_msg)
        } else {
          list(status = "OK", message = "")
        }
      },
      warning = function(w) {
        if (is.null(warn_msg)) {
          warn_msg <<- conditionMessage(w)
        }
        invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
      }
    ),
    error = function(e) list(status = "ERROR", message = conditionMessage(e))
  )
  msg <- gsub("[\r\n]+", " ", result$message)
  if (nchar(msg) > 400) {
    msg <- paste0(substr(msg, 1, 400), " [...]")
  }
  df <- data.frame(
    fn = fn_name,
    test = test_label,
    status = result$status,
    message = msg,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  add_result(df)
  invisible(df)
}

skip_row <- function(fn, test, reason) {
  add_result(data.frame(
    fn = fn,
    test = test,
    status = "SKIP",
    message = reason,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  ))
}

# Swallow messages so the console stays readable.
quiet <- function(expr) {
  suppressMessages(expr)
}

# ======================================================================
# Build FASTA fixtures (all in tempdir)
# ======================================================================
fx <- tempfile("dbpq_audit_")
dir.create(fx)

make_seq <- function(n) {
  paste(sample(c("A", "T", "G", "C"), n, replace = TRUE), collapse = "")
}

write_fasta <- function(path, headers, seqs, gz = FALSE) {
  lines <- as.vector(rbind(paste0(">", headers), seqs))
  if (gz) {
    con <- gzfile(path, open = "w")
    on.exit(close(con))
    writeLines(lines, con)
  } else {
    writeLines(lines, path)
  }
  path
}

# Five shared sequences (used for db + query in add_sh_to_taxonomy)
seqs5 <- vapply(c(150, 148, 152, 149, 151), make_seq, character(1))

# --- UNITE format, SH-style IDs (so add_sh regex ^SH[0-9]+\.[0-9]+FU fires)
sh_ids <- c(
  "SH123456.09FU", "SH123457.09FU", "SH123458.09FU",
  "SH123459.09FU", "SH123460.09FU"
)
unite_tax <- c(
  "k__Fungi;p__Basidiomycota;c__Agaricomycetes;o__Agaricales;f__Amanitaceae;g__Amanita;s__Amanita_muscaria",
  "k__Fungi;p__Basidiomycota;c__Agaricomycetes;o__Agaricales;f__Amanitaceae;g__Amanita;s__Amanita_phalloides",
  "k__Fungi;p__Ascomycota;c__Sordariomycetes;o__Hypocreales;f__Nectriaceae;g__Fusarium;s__Fusarium_oxysporum",
  "k__Fungi;p__Ascomycota;c__Sordariomycetes;o__Hypocreales;f__Nectriaceae;g__Fusarium;s__Fusarium_solani",
  "k__Fungi;p__Basidiomycota;c__Agaricomycetes;o__Boletales;f__Boletaceae;g__Boletus;s__Boletus_edulis"
)
f_unite <- file.path(fx, "unite.fasta")
write_fasta(f_unite, paste0(sh_ids, "|", unite_tax), seqs5)

# Gzipped UNITE
f_gz <- file.path(fx, "unite.fasta.gz")
write_fasta(f_gz, paste0(sh_ids, "|", unite_tax), seqs5, gz = TRUE)

# --- SINTAX format
sintax_tax <- paste0(
  "tax=d:Bacteria,k:Bacteria,p:Pseudomonadota,c:Gammaproteobacteria,",
  "o:Enterobacterales,f:Enterobacteriaceae,g:Escherichia,s:coli"
)
f_sintax <- file.path(fx, "sintax.fasta")
write_fasta(
  f_sintax,
  paste0("ID", 1:3, ";", sintax_tax),
  vapply(c(120, 121, 122), make_seq, character(1))
)

# --- Greengenes2 format (d__ + space-separated ID)
gg2_tax <- paste0(
  "d__Bacteria;p__Pseudomonadota;c__Gammaproteobacteria;",
  "o__Enterobacterales;f__Enterobacteriaceae;g__Escherichia;s__coli"
)
f_gg2 <- file.path(fx, "gg2.fasta")
write_fasta(
  f_gg2,
  paste0("ID", 1:3, " ", gg2_tax),
  vapply(c(130, 131, 132), make_seq, character(1))
)

# --- PR2 positional format (9 levels, includes supergroup keyword TSAR)
pr2_tax <- "Eukaryota;TSAR;Alveolata;Dinoflagellata;Dinophyceae;Gymnodiniales;Gymnodiniaceae;Gymnodinium;Gymnodinium_sp"
f_pr2 <- file.path(fx, "pr2.fasta")
write_fasta(
  f_pr2,
  paste0("ID", 1:3, " ", pr2_tax),
  vapply(c(140, 141, 142), make_seq, character(1))
)

# --- dada2 positional, unprefixed (detect should be "unknown")
dada2_tax <- "Bacteria;Pseudomonadota;Gammaproteobacteria;Enterobacterales;Enterobacteriaceae;Escherichia;"
f_dada2 <- file.path(fx, "dada2.fasta")
write_fasta(
  f_dada2,
  rep(dada2_tax, 3),
  vapply(c(110, 111, 112), make_seq, character(1))
)

# --- UNITE format salted with unwanted / empty values
unwanted_tax <- c(
  "k__Fungi;p__unclassified;c__;o__Incertae_sedis;f__unknown;g__;s__",
  "k__Fungi;p__Ascomycota;c__uncultured;o__;f__environmental;g__metagenome;s__",
  "k__Fungi;p__Basidiomycota;c__Agaricomycetes;o__Agaricales;f__Amanitaceae;g__Amanita;s__Amanita_muscaria"
)
f_unwanted <- file.path(fx, "unwanted.fasta")
write_fasta(
  f_unwanted,
  paste0("ID", 1:3, ";", unwanted_tax),
  vapply(c(100, 101, 102), make_seq, character(1))
)

# --- Single-sequence file
f_single <- file.path(fx, "single.fasta")
write_fasta(f_single, paste0(sh_ids[1], "|", unite_tax[1]), seqs5[1])

# --- Headers with no taxonomy
f_notax <- file.path(fx, "notax.fasta")
write_fasta(f_notax, paste0("seq", 1:3), seqs5[1:3])

# --- Empty file (zero sequences)
f_empty <- file.path(fx, "empty.fasta")
file.create(f_empty)

# --- Query FASTA for add_sh_to_taxonomy (identical seqs => guaranteed hits)
f_query <- file.path(fx, "query.fasta")
write_fasta(f_query, paste0("query", 1:2), seqs5[1:2])

# --- phyloseq fixture for count_unwanted_tax (with NA + unwanted values)
pq_unwanted <- NULL
if (has_phyloseq) {
  otu <- matrix(
    c(10, 0, 5, 3, 7, 2),
    nrow = 3, ncol = 2,
    dimnames = list(paste0("t", 1:3), c("S1", "S2"))
  )
  tax <- matrix(
    c(
      "Fungi", "Ascomycota", "unclassified", "Hypocreales", "Nectriaceae", "Fusarium", NA,
      "Fungi", "Basidiomycota", "Agaricomycetes", "Agaricales", "Incertae_sedis", "unknown", "sp",
      "Fungi", "Ascomycota", "Sordariomycetes", "Hypocreales", "Nectriaceae", "Fusarium", "oxysporum"
    ),
    nrow = 3, byrow = TRUE,
    dimnames = list(
      paste0("t", 1:3),
      c("Kingdom", "Phylum", "Class", "Order", "Family", "Genus", "Species")
    )
  )
  pq_unwanted <- quiet(phyloseq::phyloseq(
    phyloseq::otu_table(otu, taxa_are_rows = TRUE),
    phyloseq::tax_table(tax)
  ))
}

# ======================================================================
# 1. utils.R  -- tax_prefixes, detect_tax_format, get_file_extension
# ======================================================================
audit_call("tax_prefixes", tax_prefixes("unite"), "format = unite")
audit_call("tax_prefixes", tax_prefixes("sintax"), "format = sintax")
audit_call("tax_prefixes", tax_prefixes("greengenes2"), "format = greengenes2")
audit_call("tax_prefixes", tax_prefixes("pr2"), "format = pr2 (positional)")
audit_call("tax_prefixes", tax_prefixes("bogus"), "invalid format (expect error)")

audit_call("detect_tax_format", detect_tax_format(f_unite), "unite fixture")
audit_call("detect_tax_format", detect_tax_format(f_sintax), "sintax fixture")
audit_call("detect_tax_format", detect_tax_format(f_gg2), "greengenes2 fixture")
audit_call("detect_tax_format", detect_tax_format(f_pr2), "pr2 fixture (supergroup keyword)")
audit_call("detect_tax_format", detect_tax_format(f_dada2), "dada2 unprefixed (expect unknown)")
audit_call("detect_tax_format", detect_tax_format(f_gz), "gzipped unite")
audit_call("detect_tax_format", detect_tax_format(f_empty), "empty file (expect unknown)")
audit_call("detect_tax_format", detect_tax_format(f_notax), "no taxonomy headers")

audit_call("get_file_extension", get_file_extension("db.fasta"), "single extension")
audit_call("get_file_extension", get_file_extension("db.fasta.gz"), "double extension")
audit_call("get_file_extension", get_file_extension("/a/b/c.tar.bz2"), "path with double ext")
audit_call("get_file_extension", get_file_extension("noextension"), "no extension (expect error)")

# ======================================================================
# 2. summarize.R -- count_seq_db, count_pattern_db, count_unwanted_tax,
#                   list_ranks_db, summarize_db
# ======================================================================
audit_call("count_seq_db", count_seq_db(f_unite), "unite (5 seqs)")
audit_call("count_seq_db", count_seq_db(f_gz), "gzipped unite")
audit_call("count_seq_db", count_seq_db(f_empty), "empty file (expect 0)")
audit_call("count_seq_db", count_seq_db(f_single), "single seq")

audit_call("count_pattern_db", count_pattern_db(f_unite, "Amanita"), "pattern Amanita")
audit_call("count_pattern_db", count_pattern_db(f_unite, "ZZZNOMATCH"), "pattern absent (expect 0)")
audit_call("count_pattern_db", count_pattern_db(f_gz, ">"), "gz default >")

audit_call("count_unwanted_tax", quiet(count_unwanted_tax(f_unwanted)), "file with unwanted values")
audit_call("count_unwanted_tax", quiet(count_unwanted_tax(f_unite)), "clean file (expect none)")
audit_call("count_unwanted_tax", quiet(count_unwanted_tax(f_unwanted, tax_format = "unite")), "explicit tax_format")
if (has_phyloseq) {
  audit_call("count_unwanted_tax", quiet(count_unwanted_tax(pq_unwanted)), "phyloseq with NA + unwanted")
} else {
  skip_row("count_unwanted_tax", "phyloseq input", "phyloseq not installed")
}

audit_call("list_ranks_db", list_ranks_db(f_unite, rank_prefix = "p__"), "unite rank_prefix p__")
audit_call("list_ranks_db", list_ranks_db(f_unite, tax_format = "unite"), "unite tax_format")
audit_call("list_ranks_db", list_ranks_db(f_sintax, tax_format = "sintax"), "sintax tax_format")
audit_call("list_ranks_db", list_ranks_db(f_gg2, tax_format = "greengenes2"), "greengenes2 tax_format")
audit_call("list_ranks_db", list_ranks_db(f_pr2, tax_format = "pr2"), "pr2 positional")
audit_call("list_ranks_db", list_ranks_db(f_pr2, rank_position = 2), "rank_position only (no tax_format)")
audit_call("list_ranks_db", list_ranks_db(f_empty, tax_format = "unite"), "empty file")

audit_call("summarize_db", quiet(summarize_db(f_unite)), "unite default prefixes")
audit_call("summarize_db", quiet(summarize_db(f_unite, tax_format = "unite")), "unite tax_format")
audit_call("summarize_db", quiet(summarize_db(f_unite, tax_format = "auto")), "auto-detect")
audit_call("summarize_db", quiet(summarize_db(f_sintax, tax_format = "sintax")), "sintax")
audit_call("summarize_db", quiet(summarize_db(f_pr2, tax_format = "pr2")), "pr2 positional")
audit_call("summarize_db", quiet(summarize_db(f_dada2, tax_format = "auto")), "dada2 auto (unknown->unite)")
audit_call("summarize_db", quiet(summarize_db(f_single)), "single seq")
audit_call("summarize_db", quiet(summarize_db(f_empty)), "empty file")

# ======================================================================
# 3. format.R -- format_fasta_db + wrappers
# ======================================================================
audit_call(
  "format_fasta_db",
  format_fasta_db(taxnames = "AB123;k__Fungi;p__Ascomycota;c__Sordariomycetes", output_format = "sintax"),
  "unite -> sintax (taxnames)"
)
audit_call(
  "format_fasta_db",
  format_fasta_db(taxnames = "AB123;tax=k:Fungi,p:Ascomycota", output_format = "unite"),
  "sintax -> unite (taxnames)"
)
audit_call(
  "format_fasta_db",
  format_fasta_db(taxnames = "abc d__Bacteria;p__Pseudomonadota;g__Escherichia", output_format = "dada2"),
  "greengenes2 -> dada2 (taxnames)"
)
audit_call(
  "format_fasta_db",
  format_fasta_db(taxnames = "AB123;k__Fungi;g__Aspergillus;s__fumigatus", output_format = "dada2_species"),
  "unite -> dada2_species (taxnames)"
)
audit_call(
  "format_fasta_db",
  format_fasta_db(fasta_db = f_unite, output_format = "sintax", output_path = file.path(fx, "out_sintax.fasta")),
  "fasta_db unite -> sintax (output_path)"
)
audit_call(
  "format_fasta_db",
  format_fasta_db(output_format = "sintax"),
  "neither taxnames nor fasta_db (expect error)"
)
audit_call(
  "format_fasta_db",
  format_fasta_db(fasta_db = f_unite, taxnames = "x", output_format = "sintax"),
  "both inputs (expect error)"
)
audit_call(
  "format_fasta_db",
  format_fasta_db(taxnames = "plain_no_tax_string", output_format = "sintax"),
  "undetectable input (expect error)"
)

audit_call("format2sintax", format2sintax(taxnames = "AB123;k__Fungi;p__Ascomycota"), "unite taxnames")
audit_call("format2sintax", format2sintax(taxnames = "abc d__Bacteria;p__X", input_format = "greengenes2"), "gg2 explicit input")
audit_call("format2dada2", format2dada2(taxnames = "AB123;tax=k:Fungi,p:Ascomycota"), "sintax taxnames")
audit_call("format2dada2", format2dada2(taxnames = "AB123;k__Fungi;p__Ascomycota", input_format = "unite", pattern_to_remove = "Fungi"), "with pattern_to_remove")
audit_call("format2dada2_species", format2dada2_species(taxnames = "AB123;k__Fungi;g__Aspergillus;s__fumigatus"), "unite taxnames")
audit_call("format2dada2_species", format2dada2_species(taxnames = "AB123;tax=k:Fungi,g:Aspergillus,s:fumigatus", input_format = "sintax"), "sintax taxnames")

# ======================================================================
# 4. modify.R -- filter_db, cutadapt_rm_primers_db
# ======================================================================
audit_call("filter_db", quiet(filter_db(f_unite, "Amanita", output = file.path(fx, "filt1.fasta"))), "filter Amanita")
audit_call("filter_db", quiet(filter_db(f_gz, "Fusarium", output = file.path(fx, "filt2.fasta"))), "filter gz Fusarium")
audit_call("filter_db", quiet(filter_db(f_unite, "ZZZNOMATCH", output = file.path(fx, "filt3.fasta"))), "pattern absent")
audit_call("filter_db", filter_db(f_unite, "Amanita"), "missing output (expect error)")

audit_call(
  "cutadapt_rm_primers_db",
  cutadapt_rm_primers_db(f_unite, output = file.path(fx, "ct.fasta"), primer_fw = "GCATCGATGAAGAACGCAGC", primer_rev = "TCCTCCGCTTATTGATATGC", cmd_is_run = FALSE),
  "cmd_is_run = FALSE (return command string)"
)
if (has_cutadapt) {
  audit_call(
    "cutadapt_rm_primers_db",
    quiet(cutadapt_rm_primers_db(f_unite, output = file.path(fx, "ct2.fasta"), primer_fw = "GCATCGATGAAGAACGCAGC", primer_rev = "TCCTCCGCTTATTGATATGC")),
    "cmd_is_run = TRUE (cutadapt installed)"
  )
} else {
  audit_call(
    "cutadapt_rm_primers_db",
    quiet(cutadapt_rm_primers_db(f_unite, output = file.path(fx, "ct2.fasta"), primer_fw = "GCATCGATGAAGAACGCAGC", primer_rev = "TCCTCCGCTTATTGATATGC")),
    "cmd_is_run = TRUE (cutadapt absent, expect error)"
  )
}

# ======================================================================
# 5. annotate.R -- find_vsearch, is_vsearch_installed, add_sh_to_taxonomy
# ======================================================================
audit_call("find_vsearch", find_vsearch(), "default (PATH lookup)")
audit_call("find_vsearch", find_vsearch(path = "/custom/vsearch"), "explicit path (returns as-is)")
audit_call("is_vsearch_installed", is_vsearch_installed(), "default")
audit_call("is_vsearch_installed", is_vsearch_installed(path = "/nonexistent/vsearch"), "bad path (expect FALSE)")

if (has_vsearch) {
  audit_call(
    "add_sh_to_taxonomy",
    quiet(add_sh_to_taxonomy(query_fasta = f_query, unite_db = f_unite, id = 0.9)),
    "vsearch happy path (SH IDs in db)"
  )
  audit_call(
    "add_sh_to_taxonomy",
    quiet(add_sh_to_taxonomy(query_fasta = f_query, unite_db = f_unite, id = 0.9, top_hits_only = FALSE, maxaccepts = 0)),
    "all hits / ambiguity detection"
  )
  audit_call(
    "add_sh_to_taxonomy",
    add_sh_to_taxonomy(query_fasta = "/no/such/file.fasta", unite_db = f_unite),
    "missing query file (expect error)"
  )
} else {
  skip_row("add_sh_to_taxonomy", "vsearch happy path", "vsearch not installed")
}

# ======================================================================
# 6. download.R -- offline branches only; network paths SKIPPED
# ======================================================================
tdir <- file.path(fx, "dl")
dir.create(tdir, showWarnings = FALSE)

# Instruction / NULL-return branches (no network)
audit_call("download_eukaryome_db", quiet(download_eukaryome_db(dest_dir = tdir, url = NULL)), "url=NULL instructions (no network)")
audit_call("download_midori2_db", quiet(download_midori2_db(dest_dir = tdir, url = NULL)), "url=NULL instructions (no network)")
audit_call("download_diatbarcode_db", quiet(download_diatbarcode_db(dest_dir = tdir, url = NULL)), "url=NULL instructions (no network)")

# Validation-error branches reached before any download.file() call
audit_call("download_bold_db", download_bold_db(dest_dir = tdir, taxon = NULL), "taxon=NULL (expect validation error)")
audit_call("download_silva_db", download_silva_db(dest_dir = tdir, target = "LSU", format = "dada2"), "LSU+dada2 (expect validation error)")
audit_call("download_silva_db", download_silva_db(dest_dir = tdir, version = "999.9"), "unknown version (expect error before download)")
audit_call("download_greengenes2_db", download_greengenes2_db(dest_dir = tdir, version = "1900.01"), "unknown version (expect error)")
audit_call("download_rdp_db", download_rdp_db(dest_dir = tdir, trainset = "999"), "unknown trainset (expect error)")

# Functions whose every (non-error) path performs a real network download -> SKIP
skip_row("download_unite_db", "doi / sintax / default", "real download (network)")
skip_row("download_pr2_db", "all paths", "always downloads / GitHub API (network)")
skip_row("download_marjaam_db", "all paths", "always downloads (network)")
skip_row("download_silva_db", "default happy path", "real download (network)")
skip_row("download_greengenes2_db", "default happy path", "real download (network)")
skip_row("download_rdp_db", "default happy path", "real download (network)")
skip_row("download_bold_db", "valid taxon", "real BOLD API download (network)")
skip_row("download_eukaryome_db", "url given", "real download (network)")
skip_row("download_midori2_db", "url given", "real download (network)")
skip_row("download_diatbarcode_db", "url given", "real download (network)")

# ======================================================================
# Write results
# ======================================================================
audit_results <- do.call(rbind, .results)
out_csv <- "audits/dbpq_results.csv"
write.csv(audit_results, out_csv, row.names = FALSE)

cat("\nAudit complete:", nrow(audit_results), "tests run\n")
cat("OK:     ", sum(audit_results$status == "OK"), "\n")
cat("WARNING:", sum(audit_results$status == "WARNING"), "\n")
cat("ERROR:  ", sum(audit_results$status == "ERROR"), "\n")
cat("SKIP:   ", sum(audit_results$status == "SKIP"), "\n")
cat("\nResults written to", out_csv, "\n")

# Cleanup fixtures
unlink(fx, recursive = TRUE)

lines: +# External black-box audit script for the dbpq package
+# Self-contained and re-runnable. Builds independent FASTA fixtures (and
+# one phyloseq fixture for count_unwanted_tax) entirely in tempdir(),
+# calls every exported function, and writes results to
+# Network policy: download_*() functions that always hit the network are
+# NOT invoked (recorded as SKIP). Only their offline-reachable
+# validation / instruction branches are exercised. options(timeout=15)
+# is a backstop so any accidental download fails fast.
+# Load the package (prefer current source via pkgload, fallback library)
+# Swallow messages so the console stays readable.
+# Five shared sequences (used for db + query in add_sh_to_taxonomy)
-# PR2-like positional format (9 semicolon-delimited ranks, no prefix)
+# --- UNITE format, SH-style IDs (so add_sh regex ^SH[0-9]+\.[0-9]+FU fires)
-# Header with NAs / unwanted taxonomy values
+# --- PR2 positional format (9 levels, includes supergroup keyword TSAR)
+# --- UNITE format salted with unwanted / empty values
-# File with no extension for get_file_extension error testing
+# --- Query FASTA for add_sh_to_taxonomy (identical seqs => guaranteed hits)
+# --- phyloseq fixture for count_unwanted_tax (with NA + unwanted values)
+  cutadapt_rm_primers_db(f_unite, output = file.path(fx, "ct.fasta"), primer_fw = "GCATCGATGAAGAACGCAGC", primer_rev = "TCCTCCGCTTATTGATATGC", cmd_is_run = FALSE),
+    quiet(add_sh_to_taxonomy(query_fasta = f_query, unite_db = f_unite, id = 0.9, top_hits_only = FALSE, maxaccepts = 0)),
+# 6. download.R -- offline branches only; network paths SKIPPED
+audit_call("download_eukaryome_db", quiet(download_eukaryome_db(dest_dir = tdir, url = NULL)), "url=NULL instructions (no network)")
+audit_call("download_midori2_db", quiet(download_midori2_db(dest_dir = tdir, url = NULL)), "url=NULL instructions (no network)")
+audit_call("download_diatbarcode_db", quiet(download_diatbarcode_db(dest_dir = tdir, url = NULL)), "url=NULL instructions (no network)")
+# Validation-error branches reached before any download.file() call
+audit_call("download_bold_db", download_bold_db(dest_dir = tdir, taxon = NULL), "taxon=NULL (expect validation error)")
+audit_call("download_silva_db", download_silva_db(dest_dir = tdir, target = "LSU", format = "dada2"), "LSU+dada2 (expect validation error)")
+audit_call("download_silva_db", download_silva_db(dest_dir = tdir, version = "999.9"), "unknown version (expect error before download)")
+# Functions whose every (non-error) path performs a real network download -> SKIP
-# Note: count_unwanted_tax with phyloseq object is tested by the package's own tests
-# Module: download.R (all network-dependent, skip with informative reason)

content.text: Script rebuilt covering all 27 exported functions. Now running the audit from the workspace root.
